name: arpil 100
description: A single-page web application for the ARPIL 100KM CHALLENGE for the Arbyte Running Club. Features a 'Rubber-Hose 1930s Cartoon' visual theme with high-contrast black and white/sepia tones, wobbly hand-drawn borders, squash and stretch animations, and a film grain overlay. Includes a hero section, a rules guide, and a 25-runner leaderboard gallery with specific names and bios. Built with Tailwind CSS and a responsive grid layout.
